MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 2/6/06 AFTER COURT TRIAL. AT THIS TIME, THE COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC., AND AGAINST DEFENDANTS FREDERICK GIBSON AND CHRISTINE GIBSON, IN THE AMOUNT OF $2905.20 TOGETHER WITH INTEREST AT A RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM 6/27/03 TO 2/6/06 IN THE AMOUNT OF $759.10. PURSUANT TO CC 1717.5, PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $726.30. PLAINTIFF IS FURTHER AWARDED REASONABLE COSTS OF SUIT PURSUANT TO A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS TO BE FILED WITH THE COURT (LAF, D210).
